creator: cvicente@network-services.uoregon.edu
text:
Matthew Luckie wrote:
> Approved.  I went hunting for a changelog between 0.3 and 0.4 but
> didn't find one.  Anyone know in a sentence or two what is the nature
> of the changes?
>   
I just realized the Changes file is not included in the package (it will
be in the next release).

Here it is:

Revision history for Net::IPTrie

0.4  2008/10/26
  - Fixed to match the default route (0.0.0.0/0) - rt.cpan.org #38768
  - Minor changes in POD documentation

0.3  2007/11/26
  - Fixed to accept all-zero prefixes (thanks to Ville Mattila)
  - Fixes in POD documentation

0.2  2007/10/10
  - Added missing Makefile.PL and this file

0.1  2007/10/08
  Initial release.



cv
